goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'italian' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '8 people' at '11:00' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the south
Make sure you get entrance fee and phone number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve italian food and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 11:00 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
